sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - MARIE d’Auvergne ([1165]-after 1229, bur Lyon Dominican church).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - MARIE d'Auvergne, daughter of ROBERT [IV] Comte d'Auvergne & his wife Mathilde de Bourgogne [Capet] ([1160/65]-after 1229, bur Lyon Dominican Church).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie Josephine d'Auvergne於1170年出生在法國奧維豪-洛易勒 普--貝萊時，她的父親Robert VI d'AUVERGNE41歲，母親Mathilde de Bourgogne25歲。她和Albert II de la Tour du Pin至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1229年在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾享年59歲，埋葬在法國利乃斯萊昂。

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: Josephine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Joséphine, a feminine equivalent of Joseph formed with the diminutive suffix -ine. It is now widely used in the English-speaking world. Notable bearers have included the British social reformer Josephine Butler ( 1828–1906 ) and the American-born French dancer and singer Josephine Baker ( 1906–75 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marie Josephine d'Auvergne was born in 1170, in Le Puy-en-Velay, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, France, her father, Robert VI d'AUVERGNE, was 41 and her mother, Mathilde de Bourgogne, was 25. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Albert II de la Tour du Pin. She died in 1229, in Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in Lyon, Lyonnais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie Josephine d'Auvergne est née en 1170, à Le Puy-en-Velay, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, France, son père, Robert VI d'AUVERGNE, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Bourgogne, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Albert II de la Tour du Pin. Elle est décédée en 1229, à Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Lyon, Lyonnais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie Josephine d'Auvergne 1170 in Le Puy-en-Velay, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert VI d'AUVERGNE 41 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Bourgogne 25. Sie hatte mit Albert II de la Tour du Pin mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1229 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Lyon, Lyonnais, Frankreich begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Albert II de la Tour du Pin. Morì nel 1229, nel Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Lyon, Lyonnais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie Josephine d'Auvergneが1170年にフランスアウバーグンハウテ-ロイアール プウイ-エン-ベレイで生まれた時，父Robert VI d'AUVERGNEは41歳，母Mathilde de Bourgogneは25歳であった。彼女はAlbert II de la Tour du Pinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1229年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアで59歳で死去し，フランスリオナイスリオンにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Marie Josephine d'Auvergne(이)가 1170년 프랑스 오버그니 하테-로이르 일 푸이--벨레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert VI d'AUVERGNE(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Bourgogne(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Albert II de la Tour du Pin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1229년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 리나이 리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Josephine d'Auvergne nasceu em 1170, em Le Puy-en-Velay, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Robert VI d'AUVERGNE, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Bourgogne, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Albert II de la Tour du Pin. Ela faleceu em 1229, em Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Lyon, Lyonnais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie Josephine d'Auvergne родилась в 1170 г. в местности л пуи-ен-велеи, хауте-лоир, аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert VI d'AUVERGNE было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Bourgogne, 25. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Albert II de la Tour du Pin. Она умерла в 1229 г. в местности исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности лен, леннеи, Франция.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Albert II de la Tour du Pin. Murió en 1229, en Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Lyon, Lyonnais, Francia.
